IIO_per_pin.condition: Output current sourced/sunk by any I/O and control pin

IVDD.condition: Total current into VDD/VDDA power lines

IVSS.condition: Total current out of VSS ground lines

TJ.notes: Operating TJ max is 105 C for suffix-6.

VDD.condition: External main supply voltage including VDDA and VDD

delta_VDD.condition: Variations between different VDD power pins

base.description: Medium-density 64KB Flash, 20KB SRAM, 72 MHz Cortex-M3 MCU with USB, CAN, 7 timers, 2 ADCs, and 9 communication interfaces in LQFP-48.
base.family: ARM Cortex-M3 32-bit microcontroller, medium-density performance line

pinout.description: Backup battery supply for RTC and backup registers.
pinout.name: VBAT

pinout.description: GPIO Port C bit 13. Alt: TAMPER/RTC alarm.
pinout.name: PC13-TAMPER-RTC
pinout.notes: Output speed limited to 2 MHz max load 30 pF; cannot source current.

pinout.description: GPIO Port C bit 14. Alt: LSE oscillator input.
pinout.name: PC14-OSC32_IN

pinout.description: GPIO Port C bit 15. Alt: LSE oscillator output.
pinout.name: PC15-OSC32_OUT

pinout.description: HSE oscillator input. PD0 GPIO via remap.
pinout.name: PD0-OSC_IN

pinout.description: HSE oscillator output. PD1 GPIO via remap.
pinout.name: PD1-OSC_OUT

pinout.description: System reset input (active low). Internal pull-up.
pinout.name: NRST

pinout.description: Analog supply voltage for ADC, RC oscillator, PLL.
pinout.name: VDDA

pinout.description: GPIO Port A bit 0. Wakeup pin.
pinout.name: PA0-WKUP

pinout.description: GPIO Port B bit 2. Alt: BOOT1.
pinout.name: PB2

pinout.description: GPIO Port A bit 13. Default: JTMS/SWDIO.
pinout.name: PA13

pinout.description: GPIO Port A bit 14. Default: JTCK/SWCLK.
pinout.name: PA14

pinout.description: GPIO Port A bit 15. Default: JTDI.
pinout.name: PA15

pinout.description: GPIO Port B bit 3. Default: JTDO.
pinout.name: PB3

pinout.description: GPIO Port B bit 4. Default: JNTRST.
pinout.name: PB4

TA.condition: Ambient temperature, suffix-6 (C8T6) max power dissipation mode

VDDA.condition: Analog operating voltage; same potential as VDD
VDDA.notes: When ADC is used, VDDA min rises to 2.4 V.

theta_ja.condition: LQFP48 7x7 mm / 0.5 mm pitch, natural convection (JESD51-2)

rtheta_ja.condition: LQFP48 7x7 mm / 0.5 mm pitch, natural convection (JESD51-2)

vdda_range.condition: analog supply, ADC not used; min rises to 2.4 V when ADC is used
